title: lathyrus stipulaceus
intro: Lathyrus stipulaceus, also known as the small-flowered pea, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, reduce fever, and act as a natural antispasmodic, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, Lathyrus stipulaceus is often used as a tincture, infused in water, or made into a tea, allowing for its medicinal properties to be easily harnessed.
